jobs.name: GitOps & Drift Reconciliation
jobs.prompt: Execute standard GitOps & Drift Reconciliation audit. Read and follow '/opt/defaults/procedures/gitops_drift_reconcile_sop.md' exactly. If healthy and reconciled, respond with exactly 'NO_REPLY'.

jobs.name: Deployment Watcher & Recovery
jobs.prompt: Monitor active rollouts and deployments. Read and follow '/opt/defaults/procedures/deployment_watch_sop.md' to detect stalled rollouts (e.g., ImagePullBackOff or ErrImagePull), diagnose failures, and autonomously submit recovery PRs.
